summary: Prepare a Fedora-style host for k3s agent installation.
command:
ssh <new-k3s-node> 'sudo dnf -y install curl jq tar iptables-nft container-selinux; sudo systemctl disable --now firewalld || true; sudo sed -ri.bkc-k3s "/\sswap\s/s/^/#/" /etc/fstab || true; printf "overlay
br_netfilter
" | sudo tee /etc/modules-load.d/k3s.conf; printf "net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-iptables = 1
net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1
net.bridge.bridge-nf-call-ip6tables = 1
" | sudo tee /etc/sysctl.d/90-k3s.conf; sudo sysctl --system'
expected: Kernel modules, sysctl settings, and package prerequisites are ready.
